'''haboyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:labdacism|labdacism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labdacism|labdacism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| haboyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæbeyeth|hæbeyeth]] || [[word:hæbeyej|hæbeyej]] || [[word:hæbeyesh|hæbeyesh]] || [[word:hæbeye|hæbeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:haboboyoth|haboboyoth]] || [[word:haboboyoj|haboboyoj]] || [[word:haboboyosh|haboboyosh]] || [[word:haboboyo|haboboyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:haboyoth|haboyoth]] || [[word:haboyoj|haboyoj]] || [[word:haboyosh|haboyosh]] || [[word:haboyo|haboyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:habofyoth|habofyoth]] || [[word:habofyoj|habofyoj]] || [[word:habofyosh|habofyosh]] || [[word:habofyof|habofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:haboyotho|haboyotho]] || [[word:haboyojo|haboyojo]] || [[word:haboyosho|haboyosho]] || [[word:haboyoko|haboyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:haboyoth|haboyoth]] || [[word:haboyoj|haboyoj]] || [[word:haboyosh|haboyosh]] || [[word:haboyo|haboyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:haboyothol|haboyothol]] || [[word:haboyojol|haboyojol]] || [[word:haboyoshol|haboyoshol]] || [[word:haboyokol|haboyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:haboyothotho|haboyothotho]] || [[word:haboyojojo|haboyojojo]] || [[word:haboyoshosho|haboyoshosho]] || [[word:haboyoko|haboyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:haboyothon|haboyothon]] || [[word:haboyojon|haboyojon]] || [[word:haboyoshon|haboyoshon]] || [[word:haboyokon|haboyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:haboyothoro|haboyothoro]] || [[word:haboyojoro|haboyojoro]] || [[word:haboyoshoro|haboyoshoro]] || [[word:haboyokoro|haboyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
